name: Clockwork Stone Defender
languages: understands one language of its creator but can't speak

traits.name: Intercept Attack (reaction)
traits.text: In response to another creature within 5 feet of it being hit by an attack roll, the clockwork gives that creature a +5 bonus to its AC against that attack, potentially causing a miss. To use this ability, the clockwork must be able to see the creature and the attacker.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The clockwork has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Unusual Nature
traits.text: The clockwork doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.
